_comment: Species: Xiao Bai (小白) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Xiao Bai

canonical.appearance: Small white-furred beast 0.5 m, endearing, eyes large and intelligent, fur glows faintly
canonical.size: 0.5 m adult, 5 jin; ancient 1.5 m, 200 jin
canonical.behavior: Companion beast; curious, affectionate; cultivates by absorbing dawn-light
canonical.habitat: Variable (follows Wang Lin); dawn-aspected spirit veins
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: xiao_bai_beast — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
